title: Final Fantasy VII
notes: One of the clearest positive anchors in the whole project.

title: Final Fantasy IX
notes: Already in progress historically and worth revisiting.

notes: Important negative signal inside a saga you otherwise like a lot.

title: Final Fantasy Crystal Chronicles
notes: Atmosphere landed more than the loop.

title: Final Fantasy XII
notes: One of your strongest system-heavy franchise fits.

notes: Very strong PSP-era fit around combat, materia, and story.

notes: Positive overall with some repetition risk.

title: Final Fantasy XIII
notes: Important evidence that linearity alone does not hurt fit.

title: Final Fantasy XIII-2
notes: Solid continuation with maintained interest.

notes: The practical modern version to prioritize on your current hardware.

title: Final Fantasy VII Rebirth
notes: Very high-interest continuation if Remake lands.

title: Resident Evil 4
notes: Very strong action-horror fit.

title: Resident Evil 5
notes: Positive continuation with strong campaign momentum.

title: Resident Evil 7: Biohazard
notes: Another high-confidence horror fit.

title: Resident Evil Village
notes: Strong fit around atmosphere pacing and gameplay.

title: Resident Evil 4 (2023 Remake)
notes: Confirms that this franchise still lands in modern form.

title: Kingdom Hearts
notes: Liked but clearly below KH2.

notes: Story pull won over the card-system loop.

title: Kingdom Hearts II
notes: Your strongest Kingdom Hearts signal so far.

notes: Re Mind payoff content landed strongly; reinforces that you like KH when it leans into lore and momentum.

title: Kingdom Hearts HD 2.8 Final Chapter Prologue
notes: Completed on Xbox; mixed-structure collection but overall positive.

title: Castlevania: Circle of the Moon
notes: Completed at 100 percent and strong metroidvania evidence.

notes: Another clean positive metroidvania fit.

title: Castlevania: Aria of Sorrow
notes: One of your strongest portable exploration fits.

title: Castlevania: Dawn of Sorrow
notes: Confirms the DS and GBA line is a core taste signal.

title: Metal Gear Solid
notes: High-confidence story and stealth fit.

notes: Another major positive anchor for stealth-action storytelling.
